message:
feat(cass): complete Cx-first suite — 5 more _with_cx entry points (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Completes the CassClient Cx-first migration started in commit cec97055
(search_with_cx). All six public CassClient async methods now have
explicit _with_cx variants so callers threading &Cx through their API
can propagate cancellation/budget/virtual-time into the `cass` CLI
invocation without relying on ambient `cx::for_request()` lookup.

Scope:

1. crates/frankenterm-core/src/cass.rs (+146 src, +93 tests)

   New Cx-first public entry points (all asupersync-runtime gated):

     * `search_sessions_with_cx(cx, path, agent)`
     * `query_session_with_cx(cx, session_id)`
     * `query_with_cx(cx, session_path, line_number, options)`
     * `status_with_cx(cx)`
     * `trigger_index_with_cx(cx, workspace)`

   Five new extracted argv-builder helpers for bit-for-bit parity
   between legacy and Cx paths:

     * `build_search_sessions_args`
     * `build_query_session_args`
     * `build_query_args`
     * `build_trigger_index_args`
     * (plus `build_search_args` from tick 11)

   Legacy methods under `asupersync-runtime` delegate to the
   `_with_cx` variants via `cx::for_request()`. Non-asupersync
   fallback keeps the inline argv + run() pattern (run() is now
   cfg-gated to non-asupersync only since asupersync paths go
   direct to run_with_cx).

2. Seven new unit tests covering the extracted argv helpers:

   * `build_search_sessions_args_without_agent` / `_with_agent`
   * `build_query_session_args_shape`
   * `build_query_args_minimal` / `_with_context`
   * `build_trigger_index_args_without_workspace` / `_with_workspace`

   These validate that the Cx-first and legacy paths produce
   identical argv for every public method, which is the only
   behavioral contract between them.

3. `async fn run` is now `#[cfg(not(feature = "asupersync-runtime"))]`
   so `cargo clippy -D warnings` (which rejects dead_code) passes
   on asupersync builds where every caller goes through
   `run_with_cx`.

Verification (CC=llvm clang, CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/ft-rusticmaple-target):

  * cargo test -p frankenterm-core --lib cass::: 72/72 pass
    (65 after tick 11 + 7 new)
  * cargo clippy -p frankenterm-core --lib -D warnings: clean
  * rustfmt --check: clean

CassClient is now fully Cx-first — the third subprocess-wrapper to
reach parity (caut.rs fully, protocol_recovery.rs on retry backoff,
now cass on all six entry points). Leaves ft-xbnl0.2.3 still
in_progress.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
